name: Kai — Plannivo AI Agent

parameters.name: search_customers
parameters.description: Search for customers by name, email, or phone. Use when admin or manager asks to find a specific person. Returns up to 20 matches with name, email, phone, role, and wallet balance. Required: query (string). Only for admin and manager roles. Do NOT use for individual student self-lookups.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("query", "Name, email, or phone to search for", "string") }}

parameters.name: get_customer_profile
parameters.description: Get full profile of a specific customer by ID: name, email, phone, role, total lessons, and membership date. Use when you already know the customer ID from a search result. Required: customerId (string UUID).

parameters.name: check_wallet_balance
parameters.description: Get current wallet balance for a customer. ALWAYS call this before suggesting or confirming any wallet payment. For students, pass their own userId. For admin/manager, pass any customerId. Returns availableAmount and currency. Required: customerId (string UUID).
parameters.url: ={{ $env.PLANNIVO_API_BASE }}/customers/{{ $fromAI("customerId", "UUID of the customer whose wallet to check", "string") }}/wallet

parameters.name: get_customer_packages
parameters.description: Get lesson packages for a student: package name, total hours, used hours, remaining hours, and status. Use when asked about remaining lessons or package hours. Required: customerId (string UUID).

parameters.name: get_booking_list
parameters.description: Get a list of bookings filtered by date, instructor, or customer. For admin/manager: can filter by any combination. For instructor: returns own bookings. For student: returns own bookings. Optional params: date (YYYY-MM-DD), instructorId (UUID), customerId (UUID), limit (number). Do not pass customerId for student role — it is auto-scoped.

parameters.name: create_booking
parameters.description: Create a new lesson booking. ONLY call AFTER: (1) wallet balance confirmed sufficient if paymentMethod is wallet, (2) user has confirmed all details with YES. For students, studentId is always auto-set to their own ID. Required: serviceId (UUID), date (YYYY-MM-DD), startHour (number). Optional: instructorId (UUID), paymentMethod (wallet|cash|card), notes (string), customerId (UUID — admin/manager only).

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("customerId", "UUID of student — admin/manager only, leave empty for own booking", "string") }}

parameters.name: get_my_schedule
parameters.description: Get the upcoming schedule for the current user. For instructors: returns their lesson schedule. For students: returns their upcoming lessons. Optional: date (YYYY-MM-DD) to get schedule for a specific day only.

parameters.name: get_instructor_schedule
parameters.description: Get the schedule for a specific instructor. Only available for admin and manager roles. Required: instructorId (UUID). Optional: date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: get_financial_summary
parameters.description: Get revenue summary for a time period. Only available for admin and manager roles. Returns totalRevenue, bookingsCount, and breakdown by service type. Required: period (today | week | month).

parameters.name: get_student_notes
parameters.description: Get all progress notes for a student. Returns notes list and Google Doc URL. For instructors: only own students. For admin/manager: any student. Required: studentId (UUID).

parameters.name: add_student_note
parameters.description: Log a progress note for a student. For instructors: only own students. For admin/manager: any student. Returns note ID, Google Doc URL (if exists), and googleDocExists flag. If googleDocExists is false, create a Google Doc and call save_student_doc afterwards. Required: studentId (UUID), note (string).

parameters.name: save_student_doc
parameters.description: Save the Google Doc ID and URL for a student after creating it in Google Drive. Call this ONLY after creating a new Google Doc via the Google Drive node. Required: studentId (UUID), googleDocId (string), googleDocUrl (string).

parameters.name: validate_voucher
parameters.description: Validate a promo or voucher code. Returns valid (bool), discountType, discountValue, applicableServices, and validUntil. Use before applying a discount to a booking. Required: code (string).

parameters.name: code
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("code", "The voucher or promo code to validate", "string") }}

parameters.name: send_notification
parameters.description: Send an in-app notification to a user or all users of a role. Only for admin and manager. Required: title (string), message (string). One of: targetUserId (UUID) OR targetRole (student|instructor|manager|admin).

parameters.name: targetUserId
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("targetUserId", "UUID of specific user to notify (use this OR targetRole)", "string") }}

parameters.name: targetRole
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("targetRole", "Role to broadcast to: student, instructor, manager, admin (use this OR targetUserId)", "string") }}

parameters.name: send_email
parameters.description: Send an email via the academy's SMTP. Only for admin and manager. Use for customer follow-ups, booking confirmations, or announcements. Required: to (email address), subject (string), body (string — plain text or HTML).

parameters.name: get_services
parameters.description: List all available lesson services with pricing and details. Use when someone asks 'what lessons do you offer?', 'how much does kite surfing cost?', 'what courses are available?', or before creating a booking to find the correct serviceId. Optional filter: category (e.g. 'kite', 'foil', 'windsurf') or level (e.g. 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced').

parameters.name: category
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("category", "Optional: filter by category e.g. kite, foil, windsurf", "string") }}

parameters.name: level
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("level", "Optional: filter by level e.g. beginner, intermediate, advanced", "string") }}

parameters.name: get_accommodation_options
parameters.description: List available accommodation units at the center with pricing per night. ALWAYS use this tool when a guest or student asks about accommodation, staying, rooms, or where to sleep — NEVER invent accommodation options. Optional filter: type (e.g. 'villa', 'room', 'apartment').

parameters.name: type
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("type", "Optional: accommodation type filter e.g. villa, room, apartment", "string") }}

parameters.name: get_my_accommodation_bookings
parameters.description: Get accommodation reservations. For students: returns their own bookings. For admin/manager: returns all bookings. Use when asked 'what are my bookings?', 'when is my check-in?', 'show accommodation reservations'.

parameters.name: create_accommodation_booking
parameters.description: Book an accommodation unit. ONLY call AFTER: (1) showing the user the unit details and total price, (2) user confirms with explicit YES. Required: unitId (UUID from get_accommodation_options), checkInDate (YYYY-MM-DD), checkOutDate (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional: guestsCount, notes, guestId (admin/manager only — to book for a specific customer).

parameters.name: unitId
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("unitId", "UUID of the accommodation unit from get_accommodation_options", "string") }}

parameters.name: guestId
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("guestId", "UUID of the guest (admin/manager only, leave empty for own booking)", "string") }}

parameters.name: cancel_booking
parameters.description: Cancel a lesson booking. Only for admin, manager, and instructor (instructor can only cancel their own bookings). ALWAYS show a confirmation summary to the user and wait for explicit YES before calling. Required: bookingId (UUID). Optional: reason (string explaining why).

parameters.name: get_weather
parameters.description: Get real wind and weather forecast for Urla, Izmir for a specific date. Returns wind speed in knots, gusts, wind direction, and temperature at 9:00, 12:00, 15:00, 18:00. Use when someone asks about weather conditions, wind, or whether it's a good day for kite surfing. Also useful before confirming an outdoor lesson booking.

parameters.name: date
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("date", "Date to check in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to today if omitted)", "string") }}

parameters.name: get_rental_equipment
parameters.description: List available equipment for rent at the center (kites, boards, wetsuits, harnesses, etc.). Use when someone asks 'what equipment can I rent?', 'do you have kites available?', or when a student needs gear. Optional filter: type (e.g. 'kite', 'board', 'wetsuit', 'harness').

parameters.name: type
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("type", "Optional: equipment type filter e.g. kite, board, wetsuit, harness", "string") }}

parameters.name: get_member_offerings
parameters.description: List all VIP memberships, day passes, seasonal access packages, and storage options available at the center. Use when someone asks about membership, VIP access, beach access, seasonal packages, or 'what can I subscribe to?'. Returns name, description, price, period, and features for each offering.

parameters.name: get_my_subscriptions
parameters.description: Get active memberships and subscriptions for the current user. For students: their own active memberships. For admin/manager: pass userId query param to check any user's subscriptions. Use when someone asks 'what memberships do I have?', 'is my VIP still active?', 'when does my pass expire?'.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI("userId", "UUID of user to check (admin/manager only; leave empty for own subscriptions)", "string") }}

parameters.name: get_financial_expenses
parameters.description: Get business expense report for a time period. Only for admin and manager. Returns total expenses, count, and itemized list with category, description, amount. Use when asked 'what did we spend this month?', 'show expenses', 'what are our costs?'. Optional period: 'month' (default), 'week'.

parameters.name: get_wallet_deposits
parameters.description: Get recent wallet deposit requests (last 7 days). Only for admin and manager. Returns deposit amount, status (pending/completed/rejected), payment method, and user details. Use when asked 'are there pending deposits?', 'who requested a wallet top-up?', 'show recent wallet deposits'.

parameters.name: get_customer_bookings
parameters.description: Get booking history for a specific customer. Only for admin, manager, and instructor (instructor: own students only). Returns up to 50 bookings with dates, service names, amounts, and statuses. Required: customerId (UUID). Use when asked 'show bookings for [name]', 'how many lessons has this student had?'.
parameters.url: ={{ $env.PLANNIVO_API_BASE }}/customers/{{ $fromAI("customerId", "UUID of the customer to fetch bookings for", "string") }}/bookings

notes:
## Setup Checklist
1. Create n8n credential 'Kai Agent Secret' (HTTP Header Auth): Header Name = X-Kai-Agent-Secret, Value = your KAI_AGENT_SECRET env value.
2. Set n8n environment variables: PLANNIVO_API_BASE (e.g. http://backend:4000/api/agent), KAI_AGENT_SECRET.
3. Replace YOUR_GROQ_CREDENTIAL_ID with your actual Groq credential ID.
4. In production, update PLANNIVO_API_BASE to the internal Docker network URL.
5. The Groq free tier limit is ~30 req/min. Each user turn with 2 tool calls = 3 requests. Monitor usage.
